title: lysimachia ciliata var. validula
intro: Lysimachia ciliata var. validula, also known as the yellow gooseneck loosestrife or yellow loosestrife, is a perennial plant species within the primrose family that grows in moist to wet environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Lysimachia ciliata var. validula are said to include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties, although its use should be carefully researched and considered due to potential interactions with medications and allergies.
